pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed or incompatible with Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3; compilation fails if code imports javax.annotation.*

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot.

registry-core-elasticsearch/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the annotation API dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ ecosystems.
registry-core-elasticsearch/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer included in the JDK or standard Spring Boot 3 dependencies; using it causes ClassNotFoundException at runtime or compilation errors if the old artifact is removed from the parent BOM.

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: logger.debug(String.format("@Retryable 'searchId(resourceType=%s, ids={%s})'", resourceType, String.join(",", Arrays.stream(fields).map(keyValue -> keyValue.getField() + "=" + keyValue.getValue()).collect(Collectors.toSet()))));

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format("Quantity should be up to %s.", maxQuantity));
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.after: throw new IllegalArgumentException("Quantity should be up to %s.".formatted(maxQuantity));

registry-core-helper/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
registry-core-helper/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and fully absent in Java 17; code using @Generated or other javax annotations will fail to compile without the Jakarta replacement.

registry-core-jms/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

registry-core-rest/src/main/java/gr/uoa/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

registry-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate annotation dependency from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
registry-core/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ environments use the jakarta.* namespace; using javax.annotation will result in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because the classes are no longer present under the javax prefix.

registry-core/src/main/java/gr/uoa/di/ma.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().
